finding_results.notes: The depot-to-night transition now makes the pre-3 PM timestamp lead into an after-school pickup, and the later Wednesday summary explicitly includes Bea returning from school before dark.

The narration now identifies the `Tue 12 Nov` line as the first lie allowed into the bound Ashdown book and explicitly frames earlier secrecy as softer omissions rather than earlier falsified entries.
The opening scandal-morning atmosphere now relies on damp cardboard, hot toner, stale coffee, wet wool, and van exhaust instead of the repeated house packet.
Noor's pressure beat now uses his own practical tell, aligning the foil parcel and working his jaw, rather than the generic stillness shorthand.

summary: Resolved all four packet findings in `chapter_09` by repairing the impossible afternoon route sequence, anchoring the first falsified Ashdown record to `Tue 12 Nov`, and replacing repeated atmosphere/reaction formulas with chapter-specific details.
